<!--
Thanks for contributing to WorCoffee! ☕
Please make sure your PR meets these:
-->

### Place(s) added / updated

-

### Checklist
- [ ] File lives at `data/places/<country-slug>/<city-slug>/<place-slug>.json`
- [ ] All required fields are filled (`name`, `country`, `city`, `address`, `rating`)
- [ ] Ratings are integers 1–5
- [ ] Links are valid URLs (Google Maps, Instagram, etc.)
- [ ] I have personally been there (or have a trusted source)
